headline: Mile High Royal Lions: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Mile High Royal Lions carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 83.88, led by Jahmyr Gibbs, Drake London, and Jalen Hurts. The clearest lineup pressure point is the RB slot held by J.K. Dobbins at 58.8 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jahmyr Gibbs (99.6), Drake London (97.8), and Jalen Hurts (91.2).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: J.K. Dobbins is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 58.8. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 12 offensive players, with 4 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 77.75.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 12 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
